task_completion.description: OpenICE Vital Signs application is open and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenICE interface or the 'Vital Signs' clinical application window on the screen.

task_completion.description: Heart Rate and Temperature are set to the target values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vital Signs app displays a Heart Rate of approximately 115 bpm (±5) and a Temperature of approximately 39.2 C (±0.5).

task_completion.description: Invasive Blood Pressure is set to the target values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vital Signs app displays an Invasive Blood Pressure (IBP) of approximately 82/45 mmHg (±5).

task_completion.description: Infusion Rate is set to the target value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vital Signs app or Infusion Pump simulator displays an Infusion Rate of approximately 250 mL/hr (±5).

task_completion.description: The required screenshot file is saved to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'sepsis_vitals_evidence.png' is visible on the Desktop or in a file explorer window at '/home/ga/Desktop/'.

task_completion.description: The required JSON configuration file is saved to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'sepsis_config.json' is visible on the Desktop, or an open text editor/terminal shows its contents with the keys 'heart_rate', 'bp_systolic', 'bp_diastolic', 'temperature', and 'infusion_rate'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenICE software to configure the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent opening OpenICE, navigating its menus, or adjusting device simulator parameters, rather than just opening a pre-made image.

integrity.description: The agent actively captured the screenshot of the Vital Signs app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of a screenshot tool (like GNOME screenshot) or a terminal command (like scrot or import) to create 'sepsis_vitals_evidence.png'.

integrity.description: The agent manually created or generated the JSON configuration file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or terminal commands (like echo or cat) being used to write the JSON content, rather than copying a pre-existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target values for the septic shock simulation: Heart Rate 115 bpm (±5), Invasive Blood Pressure (IBP) 82/45 mmHg (±5), Temperature 39.2°C (±0.5), and Infusion Rate 250 mL/hr (±5). The task requires using the OpenICE platform (specifically the 'Vital Signs' app) to visualize these parameters. Two files must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/: 'sepsis_vitals_evidence.png' (a screenshot of the app) and 'sepsis_config.json' (containing keys 'heart_rate', 'bp_systolic', 'bp_diastolic', 'temperature', 'infusion_rate').
